title: Tonbridge Police Station: Custody and Voluntary Interview Advice
metaTitle: Tonbridge Police Station Custody and Interview Advice
metaDescription: Free legal advice at Tonbridge police station for custody and voluntary interviews across west Kent. Call 01732 247427 or text 07535 494446.
contentHtml:
In brief

Tonbridge police station operates a 24-hour custody suite and hosts voluntary interviews for west Kent. You are entitled to free legal advice before any interview under caution.

Custody at Tonbridge

Arrests from Tonbridge, Tunbridge Wells, Sevenoaks and surrounding areas may be dealt with at Tonbridge custody (1 Pembury Road, TN9 2HS). After booking in, a detainee may request a duty solicitor before interview.

Voluntary interviews

Police may invite someone to a voluntary interview at Tonbridge without arrest. These interviews are under caution and carry the same legal risks as custody interviews — legal advice is still free.

Arranging representation

Call 01732 247427 or text 07535 494446 if unable to call. See police station cover — Tonbridge, West Kent area hub, and voluntary interview advice.

General information only.

faq.a: Yes. Tonbridge is west Kent's main 24-hour custody facility and also hosts voluntary interviews.

faq.q: Is legal advice free at a Tonbridge voluntary interview?
faq.a: Legal advice at the police station under the duty solicitor scheme is free for most people being interviewed. This is general information only.

author: Robert Cashman
